renamePatterns.name: componentName
renamePatterns.description: Rename a React component declared as function or const (PascalCase)

renamePatterns.name: propInterfaceName
renamePatterns.description: Rename a component props interface or type alias

renamePatterns.name: variantConstName
renamePatterns.description: Rename a cva() variant const definition

renamePatterns.name: hookName
renamePatterns.description: Rename a custom React hook (must start with use)

renamePatterns.name: formSchemaName
renamePatterns.description: Rename a Zod form validation schema

renamePatterns.name: columnAccessorKey
renamePatterns.description: Rename a column accessor key in DataTable column definitions

patterns.message: Component names must be PascalCase (e.g. Button, DataTable)
Hook names must start with 'use' followed by PascalCase (e.g. useToast, useFormField)
Utility functions and variables must be camelCase (e.g. cn, buttonVariants)
